goal: A concrete implementation request with file references and measurable acceptance criteria skips the Idea Interview Gate and proceeds directly to the Clarification Gate

input.query: Add a Pass 5 to evals/validate.mjs that verifies every file in skills/patterns/ is listed in skills/index.md. Done when validate.mjs exits 0 and the new pass is labelled in the file header comment.
input.context: Specific file paths named (evals/validate.mjs, skills/patterns/, skills/index.md). Concrete acceptance criteria present (exit code 0, labelled pass). Technology specified (Node.js, validate.mjs).

expected.must_not: invoke vscode/askQuestions for an idea interview when concrete signals are present
